concepts: The sexual orientations of the friends (gay, bisexual)
current_setting: the first person is gay and the second person is bisexual
new_settings: the first person is bisexual and the second person is gay

concepts: The friendship between the two individuals
new_settings: the two individuals are not friends (e.g., acquaintances or rivals)

concepts: The upcoming speed‑dating event they are attending
current_setting: they are attending a speed‑dating event
new_settings: they are attending a different type of event, such as a book‑club meeting

concepts: The bisexual friend’s action of asking many questions about the other attendees
current_setting: the bisexual friend was asking a lot of questions about the other attendees
new_settings: the bisexual friend was not asking many questions about the other attendees (e.g., remained silent)

concepts: The gay friend’s action of confidently discussing the type of person they are looking for
current_setting: the gay friend was confidently discussing the type of person they were looking for
new_settings: the gay friend was not confidently discussing the type of person they were looking for (e.g., expressed uncertainty)

current_setting: the bisexual friend displayed an inquisitive/curious attitude
new_settings: the bisexual friend displayed an uninterested/unconcerned attitude

current_setting: the gay friend displayed a confident/assertive attitude
new_settings: the gay friend displayed a timid/shy attitude
